changelog: First Comlink command now reliably reaches the WCB.** Fixed a race condition
where the first Comlink command after a cold connection would silently fail —
the booster reported success but the bytes were dropped before reaching the
device. The previous workaround of opening the WCB tab in DroidNet first is no
Comlink history view recovers from corruption automatically.** A torn write
could previously leave the history file unparseable, causing the history view
to error every poll and crashing the Comlink service thread on the next
command. The view now self-heals: corrupt files are preserved as
`.corrupt.<timestamp>` for diagnosis and a fresh history starts immediately.
DroidNet Signal Booster 2.0 — major release with expanded Cantina Studio animation editor, WCB Wizard integration, and Maestro servo control improvements.
Cantina Studio: full beat-aligned animation editor with interactive graphical timeline, drag-to-edit, scrub playback, and 18-pattern sequence library.
WCB tab: integrated WCB Wizard for guided board setup and configuration.
Maestro: unified animation editor merging generator and recorder, ghost preview, undo/redo snapshots, and duplicate support.
Droid tab: manage multiple Signal Boosters in a single droid with real-time per-device status and one-click coordinated updates.
Pi Zero W is no longer supported — use Pi Zero 2 W, Pi 3, or Pi 4.

1.note: Debug images available - contact for download links

2.note: Fresh-install SD-card images for 2.0. Pi Zero W is not supported in 2.0 — use Pi Zero 2 W. Minor releases (2.0.61+) are update packages only; images live exclusively on this v2.0.60 release.
